suites.title: Sticky features — backup/restore, client directory, auto-numbering

specs.title: auto-numbering: New button creates sequential invoice numbers
auto-numbering: first-ever visit pre-fills INV-1001, not a random number (#12)
auto-numbering: returning user with a saved invoice is unaffected (#12)
history: downloading a PDF records the invoice as "sent" (#8)
history: Load button reloads the invoice into the editor (#9)
history: Load button is disabled (with an honest tooltip) when no snapshot is saved (#3)
backup/restore: dialog opens with export and import options
backup/restore: export downloads valid JSON backup
client directory: dialog opens with empty state
client directory: shows free tier limit (3 clients)
invoice history: empty state shown on first visit
invoice history: shows pre-populated records with status badges
all three sticky buttons are hidden in embed mode

formatCurrency matches Intl for valid currencies (incl. 0- and 3-decimal)
Intl itself resolves the right fraction digits — no minorUnits map needed
formatCurrency never throws; falls back to "CODE amount" when Intl rejects a code
currencySymbol matches Intl currency literal, raw code for unknown
formatCurrencyPdf uses the ISO code (no non-WinAnsi glyph) under en-US

every new field survives a JSON round-trip (the silent-drop guard)
old-shape invoice (no new fields) round-trips with optionals undefined
a malformed paymentMeans is dropped, not the whole invoice

an invalid taxCategory on a line is dropped, the line survives
taxCategory does NOT affect totals (flat-rate, smart-tax is NEXT)
